required_complexity_patterns.notes: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input

reference_templates.title: Question number prefixes
reference_templates.notes: Fields prefixed with Q7. Q12. style question numbers
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Question prefixes

reference_templates.title: Split phone inputs
reference_templates.notes: Country code select and local number in separate inputs
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Split phone

reference_templates.title: Reverse DOM field order
reference_templates.notes: Input element appears before its label in DOM (float-right layout pattern)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Reverse DOM order

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Reference DOM (Question number prefixes): Fields prefixed with Q7. Q12. style question numbers Reference DOM (Split phone inputs): Country code select and local number in separate inputs Reference DOM (Reverse DOM field order): Input element appears before its label in DOM (float-right layout pattern) Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: pill-yes-no, table-layout, aria-labelledby-hidden, decoy-form, div-role-textbox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: definition list dl/dt/dd label pairs. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Question number prefixes; Split phone inputs; Reverse DOM field order.
